da.hero_subtitle: Følg med live når vi streamer yogaklasser, workshops og særlige events direkte fra vores studie i Christianshavn.
da.offline_title: Vi er ikke live lige nu
da.offline_text: Kom tilbage senere for at se vores næste livestream. Følg os på sociale medier for at få besked, når vi går live.
da.reconnecting_text: Forbindelsen blev kort afbrudt. Vi forsøger at genoprette automatisk — bliv på siden.
da.error_text: Kunne ikke indlæse stream. Prøv igen om lidt.
da.schedule_empty: Ingen planlagte live sessions lige nu.
da.interactive_leave_confirm: Er du sikker på, at du vil forlade sessionen?
da.interactive_login_required: Du skal logge ind for at deltage i denne interaktive session.

en.hero_subtitle: Join us live as we stream yoga classes, workshops and special events directly from our studio in Christianshavn.
en.offline_text: Check back later to catch our next livestream. Follow us on social media to get notified when we go live.
en.reconnecting_text: The connection was briefly interrupted. We're trying to reconnect automatically — please stay on this page.
en.error_text: Could not load stream. Please try again shortly.
en.schedule_empty: No live sessions scheduled right now.
en.interactive_leave_confirm: Are you sure you want to leave this session?
en.interactive_login_required: You need to log in to join this interactive session.
en.interactive_permission_denied: Camera/microphone permission denied. Check your browser settings.
